---
title: "Issue Blocking"
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
---

```{python}
import json
from pathlib import Path
from IPython.display import HTML, display

_candidates = [Path("quarto-data/issue-blocking.json"), Path("../quarto-data/issue-blocking.json")]
data_file = next((p for p in _candidates if p.exists()), None)
if data_file is None:
    raise FileNotFoundError(
        "quarto-data/issue-blocking.json not found. "
        "Run: python NceGitLab.py --report issue-blocking"
    )

d       = json.loads(data_file.read_text())
group   = d["group"]
summary = d["summary"]
```

```{python}
HTML(f"""
<p>
  <strong>Report Date:</strong> {d['report_date']} &nbsp;|&nbsp;
  <strong>Group:</strong> <a href="{group['url']}" target="_blank">{group['name']}</a>
</p>
""")
```

## Summary

```{python}
s = summary
html = '<table class="table table-sm table-striped" style="max-width:480px"><thead><tr><th>Metric</th><th>Count</th></tr></thead><tbody>'
html += f"<tr><td>Blocked issues</td><td><strong>{s['total_blocked']}</strong></td></tr>"
html += f"<tr><td>Total blocking relationships</td><td><strong>{s['total_relationships']}</strong></td></tr>"
html += "</tbody></table>"
HTML(html)
```

## Blocked Issues

```{python}
blocked_items = d["blocked_items"]
if not blocked_items:
    display(HTML("<p>✅ No blocked issues found.</p>"))
else:
    html = "<p>Issues with one or more active <code>is_blocked_by</code> links:</p>"
    html += '<table class="table table-sm table-bordered"><thead><tr>'
    html += "<th>Blocked Issue</th><th>Project</th><th>Epic</th><th>Blocked By</th>"
    html += "</tr></thead><tbody>"
    for item in blocked_items:
        ilink = f'<a href="{item["url"]}" target="_blank">⛔ {item["title"]}</a>' if item["url"] else f'⛔ {item["title"]}'
        proj  = item.get("project_path") or "—"
        epic  = item.get("epic_title") or "—"
        blockers = item.get("blockers", [])
        blocked_by = "<br>".join(
            f'🔒 <a href="{b["url"]}" target="_blank">{b["title"]}</a>' if b["url"] else f'🔒 {b["title"]}'
            for b in blockers
        ) or "—"
        html += f"<tr><td>{ilink}</td><td>{proj}</td><td>{epic}</td><td>{blocked_by}</td></tr>"
    html += "</tbody></table>"
    display(HTML(html))
```

::: {.callout-note collapse="true"}
## Legend

| Icon | Meaning |
|------|---------|
| ⛔ | Blocked — issue has at least one active blocker |
| 🔒 | Blocker — directly blocking this issue |
:::
